creator: raj@csub.edu
text:
On 07/29/2010 03:00 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/puppet,
>
> Please note that PR ports/149060 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/149060
>

Working my own update concurrently. I'll include the url encoding fix included in this patch.

At the moment there is a problem with 2.6.0 and the version of apache/passenger in ports 
that I'm working out. I also patched 0.25.5's service provider to use augeas, but the 
service provider was totally rewritten in 2.6.0 much to my surprise. I also 
patched/removed the ports provider since it doesn't/can't work reliably.

FYI. Nobody ever commited the update to 0.25.5 submitted in ports/146812.

-- 
Russell A. Jackson <raj@csub.edu>
Network Analyst
California State University, Bakersfield
